title: Order Amending Part III of the Schedule to Part J of the Food and Drug Regulations (Carisoprodol) - Canada.ca
content:
## Order Amending Part III of the Schedule to Part J of the Food and Drug Regulations (Carisoprodol)
The Minister of Mental Health and Addictions and Associate Minister of Health makes the annexed Order Amending Part III of the Schedule to Part J of the Food and Drug Regulations (Carisoprodol) under subsections J.01.002(1) Footnote a and (2) Footnote a of the Food and Drug Regulations Footnote b .
Ottawa, February 27, 2025
Minister of Mental Health and Addictions and Associate Minister of Health

## Order Amending Part III of the Schedule to Part J of the Food and Drug Regulations (Carisoprodol)
- 1 Part III of the schedule to Part J of the Food and Drug Regulations Footnote b is amended by adding the following: Item Column 1 Substance Column 2 Period 1 Carisoprodol (2-((carbamoyloxy)methyl)-2-methylpentyl isopropylcarbamate) April 14, 2025 to April 13, 2026
Carisoprodol (2-((carbamoyloxy)methyl)-2-methylpentyl isopropylcarbamate)
April 14, 2025 to April 13, 2026
- 2 Item 1 of Part III of the schedule to Part J of the Regulations is deleted.
- 3 (1) Subject to subsection (2), this Order comes into force on April 14, 2025.
- (2) Section 2 comes into force on the earlier of, but no earlier than April 15, 2025, (a) the day on which a provision of an order made under section 60 of the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act comes into force, if that provision adds carisoprodol (2-((carbamoyloxy)methyl)-2-methylpentyl isopropylcarbamate) to any of Schedules I, II, III, IV or VI to that Act, and (b) April 14, 2026.
- (a) the day on which a provision of an order made under section 60 of the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act comes into force, if that provision adds carisoprodol (2-((carbamoyloxy)methyl)-2-methylpentyl isopropylcarbamate) to any of Schedules I, II, III, IV or VI to that Act, and
Return to footnote a referrer
Return to footnote b referrer
